message:
feat(gateway): scaffold Bun/Hono app with a basic health endpoint

Adds the initial `apps/gateway` service shell.

What’s included
- Bun-native entrypoint (`apps/gateway/src/index.ts`) using Hono:
  - `GET /health` returns `{ ok: true, timestamp }` for liveness checks.
  - Exports the `app` instance so it can be mounted/tested without starting a server.
  - Uses `Bun.serve({ fetch: app.fetch })` when invoked as the main module.
- App-local workspace config:
  - `apps/gateway/package.json` with `dev` (`bun --hot`), `build`, and `test` scripts.
  - `apps/gateway/tsconfig.json` placeholder for app-specific overrides.
- `apps/gateway/tests/README.md` stub to document the eventual integration/route test layout.

Why this shape
- Keeps the gateway runtime Bun-native and small.
- Separates “app object” from “process/server boot” to make automated tests deterministic.
- Establishes the `/health` contract early so other tooling (web UI, e2e harness, supervisors) can rely on it.
